certificate.module_name: Radiant Logic Cryptographic Module for Java
certificate.caveat: When operated in approved mode. No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys).
certificate.description: Radiant Logic Cryptographic Module for Java is a standards-based cryptographic engine for native Java environments. The module delivers core cryptographic functions to mobile and server platforms and features robust algorithm support.
